package.name: comm_benchmark
package.description: Inter-PC communication bake-off harness for the bilateral teleop project. Mocks the leader↔follower message pattern (1 KiB payload at 500 Hz) and exposes pluggable transports (ROS2 BEST_EFFORT, ROS2 multi-threaded executor, raw UDP) for jitter / throughput measurement under (optionally tc-netem-emulated) WAN conditions.
